item.title: F-010: Typography and Layout
item.intent: Typography is our silent differentiator — the rendered markdown must be so beautiful that users notice it subconsciously and can never go back to other editors
item.description: Custom typefaces for editor and UI chrome. Line height, paragraph spacing, margins optimized per device class. Responsive layout adapts to screen size. Max content width on large screens (~70-80 chars). Respects Dynamic Type.
acceptanceCriteria: Designer reviews rendered markdown on iPhone SE, iPhone 15 Pro Max, iPad Mini, and iPad Pro — all feel intentionally designed
Dynamic Type at default and large sizes renders correctly on all device classes
Content width is 65-80 characters on iPad landscape and external displays
Line height is 1.5-1.7x font size, paragraph spacing is at least 0.5x line height
Minimum margins: 16pt on iPhone, 32pt on iPad
Custom typeface renders correctly for Latin, CJK, Arabic, and Devanagari scripts
Extreme Dynamic Type accessibility sizes render without clipping or text overlap
